zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ellis於1474年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾潘頓時，他的父親Morris Ellis44歲，母親Cathrine4歲。他於1489年與Agnes Marshall在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Ellis于1474年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾潘頓时，他的父亲Morris Ellis44岁，母亲Cathrine4岁。他于1489年与Agnes Marshall在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ellis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Ellison
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ellis (Old Testament Elijah) + -son.
English: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Elissent, Elisant, ancient Germanic Elisind.

Scottish: sometimes a post-medieval variant of Allison , which is mainly concentrated in northern England and southwestern Scotland. There is a similar Scottish variation between Alison and Elison as female personal names.

variants.name: Ely
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .
English: variant of   Healey  .

variants.name: Eales
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Ellis , or, alternatively, a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Devon the name may also be a variant of Heales, with loss of initial H-, itself a variant of Heal or Heel, with post-medieval excrescent -s, or a variant of Hales .

variants.name: Elcock
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name (H)elecoc, commonly a pet form of (H)elie, itself a pet form of Ellis (from Latin Elias), but sometimes also a Middle English pet form of the female name Ellen + the hypocoristic suffix -cok.

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.
Scottish: late variant of   Elwood  .

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

variants.name: Bellis
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Elisedd ‘son of Elisedd’ (see Ellis ).

English: possibly also a nickname from bellis, the regular form of bellows until the 16th century (see Bellows ). The form bellis persisted generally until the 16th century and much later in various dialects.

Italian: patronymic from the personal name Bello . It is formed with the Latin ablative plural suffix -is imparting the broader sense ‘belonging to, of’, in this case ‘member of the Belli family’ (compare Belli ). Compare also De Bellis .

variants.name: Elles
meanings: English: variant either of   Ellis   or   Ells  .
Dutch and German: variant of   Ellens  .

variants.name: Elijah
meanings: Welsh, Jewish, and African American: from the personal name Elijah, the usual English transliteration in the King James Bible of the Hebrew name Eliyahu ‘Jehovah is God’, the name of an Old Testament prophet (compare Elias , Ellis ). As a Welsh surname, this is a comparatively late adoption of the personal name, adopted after Old Testament personal names became popular among Nonconformists.

variants.name: Ells
meanings: English (London and Kent): variant of Ellis , or a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ellis was born in 1474, in Panton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Morris Ellis, was 44 and his mother, Cathrine, was 4. He married Agnes Marshall in 1489, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1544, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ellis est né en 1474, à Panton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Morris Ellis, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Cathrine, avait 4 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Marshall en 1489, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1544, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Ellis 1474 in Panton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morris Ellis 44 und seine Mutter Cathrine 4. Er hat 1489 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1544 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ellis(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morris Ellis(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Cathrine(은)는 4세였다. 그는 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 지르스비에서 Agnes Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
